Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shatterspine Castle]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Shatterspine Castle is a place like those in the Wasteland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Shatterspine Castle fell almost a thousand years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Shatterspine Castle has a basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Shatterspine Castle was moved by the Rune Queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Shatterspine Castle is falling apart during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Orthos and Ziel are in a dark room of crumbled stone at the bottom of Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Shatterspine Castle is a location where Ziel is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Shatterspine Castle is located in a desert.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Lindon brought back samples of the Rune Queen's madra from Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon drifted into Shatterspine Castle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
